explanation: No code changes were made because activation offloading is intentionally not applicable here: the profile shows the model is not memory-bound, and the requested optimization would only add CPU/GPU transfer overhead without benefit.
warnings: Activation offloading would likely reduce throughput substantially for this workload.
not_applicable_reason: The workload is not memory-capacity bound; the model only uses a small fraction of available VRAM, so offloading activations to CPU would add overhead without solving a real bottleneck.
